name: UnrealGenAISupport
description: UnrealMCP is here!! Automatic blueprint and scene generation from AI!! An Unreal Engine plugin for LLM/GenAI models & MCP UE5 server. Supports Claude Desktop App, Windsurf & Cursor, also includes OpenAI's GPT4o, DeepseekR1, Claude Sonnet 3.7 APIs and Grok 3, with plans to add Gemini, audio & realtime APIs soon.
